text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's been so much to think about lately when
it comes to training. I feel like my head is going
to explode.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, you look exhausted!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There, there, Trainer. I know you've been working
hard.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: After all this effort, I think you deserve a treat.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Nope, there's no way around it—you're getting
that treat.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Even if you were only working hard for your own
sake, the fruits of your labor still trickle down to
me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It only makes sense for me to pay you back
somehow.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Let me know if there's anything you want, okay?
Perhaps a tasty meal? Or a shoulder massage?
choice_data_list: Maybe something to clear my head...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Your head...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I've got just the thing! Sit tight. I just
need to make a call.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making a phone call, Super Creek leads me
away.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heya! Over here, Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Maruzen! Sorry to keep you waiting!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks for calling! Shall we get to it?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We're going to the most wonderful place. Right,
Maruzen? ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Exactamundo. You're gonna have the best time
ever! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A bit later...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's time for the real deal! Hold on tight, you two!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! You're really drifting around these
corners. Isn't this exciting, Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're at a racing circuit. The squeal of tires fills
my ears as the wind pulls back the skin on my
face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can barely keep my eyes open as Maruzensky
careens around the track in her beloved car. My
mind goes completely blank.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, that felt incredible! I haven't had such a
radical time in so long!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
How'd you like that speed? Bet your head's clear
now, huh?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Maruzen's given me a ride in her car before.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It felt so amazing that I figured you'd like it too,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What did you think?
choice_data_list: You've got a stronger stomach than I have.
You've got a stronger stomach than I have.

Well, her driving is nothing to sneeze at, I'll tell
you that...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What did you think?
choice_data_list: You've got a stronger stomach than I have.
You've got a stronger stomach than I have.

Well, her driving is nothing to sneeze at, I'll tell
you that...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, did you feel it in your guts? You're all
psyched up now, huh?! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's wonderful! It makes organizing this all
worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Thank you for your help, Maruzen.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's all good! I could do this every day. In fact,
wanna go for another spin?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness! Really?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, if you're offering, then I'll happily
accept. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I politely decline, they're feeling too
"psyched up" to actually hear me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Aww, you'll make me blush with compliments like
that! Cut it out already! But seriously, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Isn't that nice, Maruzen? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Don't mention it. In fact, I'm always down for
doing stuff like this!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's been way too long since I last put the pedal to
the metal! Wowzers, it felt amazing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You were seriously impressive. How on earth did
you learn to drive like that?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I suppose I just have a knack for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Exhausted beyond belief, I listen to Maruzensky
and Super Creek chat away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At least, it looks like Super Creek has learned
something from Maruzensky's fierce driving.
